section_miscategorizations.text: The patient needs to get the cream refilled.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a statement of current medication state/need (ongoing therapy requiring refill), not a newly made plan or order in this encounter.
This describes existing medication use as part of the patient's current treatment history, which belongs in HPI rather than in the Plan.
This is prior treatment history/current medication state, not a new order or management step from this visit, so it fits HPI rather than Plan.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient has received the vaccine.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is past immunization history; while sometimes summarized in the plan, it more accurately reflects prior history/medication state and fits better in HPI.
